description:
# GlassiFy 2.1 — Release Notes

**Version:** v2.1.2603 
**Release date:** March 18, 2025
**Status:** Stable

We are excited to introduce GlassiFy v2.1! This major release transforms the library from our unique frosted liquid glass utility into a full Liquid Glass Rendering Engine with both GlassiFy's Super Frosted Liquid Glass effect and Traditional Liquid Glass effect inspired by Apple Design. Now you can use both effects, and the new traditional liquid glass effect increases performance by 200%.

### ✨ Bug Fixes

```html
<script src="https://glassify.saviru.me/cdn/2.0/glassify.js"></script>
<script src="https://glassify.saviru.me/cdn/glassify.js"></script>
```
